source_text_snapshot: The figure shows the single line diagram of a power system with a double circuit transmission line. The expression for electrical power is \(1.5 \sin \delta\), where \( \delta \) is the rotor angle. The system is operating at the stable equilibrium point with mechanical power equal to 1 pu. If one of the transmission line circuits is removed, the maximum value of \( \delta \) as the rotor swings is 1.221 radian. If the expression for electrical power with one transmission line circuit removed is \( P_{\text{max}} \sin \delta\), the value of \( P_{\text{max}} \), in pu, is _______.

If the expression for electrical power with one transmission line circuit removed is \( P_{\text{max}} \sin \delta\), the value of \( P_{\text{max}} \), in pu, is _______.

source_text_snapshot:
A 3-phase transmission line is shown in the <image>:
The voltage drop across the transmission line is given by the following equation:
$$
\left[\begin{array}{l}
\Delta V_a \\
\Delta V_b \\
\Delta V_c
\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{lll}
Z_s & Z_m & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_s & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_m & Z_s
\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}
I_a \\
I_b \\
I_c
\end{array}\right]
$$
The shunt capacitance of the line can be neglected. If the line has a positive sequence impedance of \( 15 \, \Omega \) and a zero sequence impedance of \( 48 \, \Omega \), then the values of \( Z_s \) and \( Z_m \) will be:

\end{array}\right]
$$
The shunt capacitance of the line can be neglected. If the line has a positive sequence impedance of \( 15 \, \Omega \) and a zero sequence impedance of \( 48 \, \Omega \), then the values of \( Z_s \) and \( Z_m \) will be:
normalized_text_snapshot:
For a 3-phase transmission line, the voltage drop is given by
$$
\left[\begin{array}{l}
\Delta V_a \\
\Delta V_b \\
\Delta V_c
\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{lll}
Z_s & Z_m & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_s & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_m & Z_s
\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}
I_a \\
I_b \\
I_c
\end{array}\right]
$$
The shunt capacitance of the line can be neglected. If the line has a positive sequence impedance of 15 \,\Omega and a zero sequence impedance of 48 \,\Omega, what is the value of \(Z_m\)?
